response:
TechVentures post-demo playbook completed:
- Advanced the $250,000 opportunity to **Proposal** in Salesforce.
- Booked the buyer pricing discussion for **April 1, 2026, 17:00–17:45 UTC**.
- Created the technical Q&A for **April 2, 2026, 17:00–17:45 UTC** with Zoom link: https://zoom.us/j/9179087490.
- Staged the Enterprise Agreement in DocuSign as an **unsent draft**.
- Blocked private proposal prep time for **April 1, 2026, 15:30–16:30 UTC**.
- Generated tailored proposal talking points and added them to the prep event.
- Posted the completed action summary in **#deal-room-techventures**.

messages.text: Maplecrest Systems sent us an unsolicited security questionnaire — anyone know this account?
Week 10 starts Monday. Let's sprint to close! Who needs backup on any deals?
Meadowbrook Tech rescheduled again — Q2 for sure. Marking as delayed in CRM.
CloudBridge legal has questions about data residency. Looping in our DPO for a joint call.
Big W: Bayside Analytics just signed! $85k ARR, 18-month deal. Congrats team! 🥳
Ironridge is back! After 6 weeks dark they replied to the breakup email. Scheduling a call.
OOO Wed-Thu for QBR prep. All my accounts covered — ping me if urgent.
Stonebridge Holdings asked for a multi-year price lock. Escalating to pricing committee.
Terrace Software close call Friday! Getting the MSA signed before Q1 ends.
Wavecrest Analytics asking for a case study. Does anyone have an analytics vertical reference?
Q1 close plan: 5 deals in final stage, $620k at risk. Let's align on blockers today.
Anyone have a warm contact at Northstar Media? Need an intro for the media vertical.
Oceanfront Labs pilot complete — 9/10 satisfaction. Moving to full deployment next month 🎉
Foxridge Capital — legal pushed back on the liability cap. Anyone dealt with this before?
Reminder: all deals >$50k need second-level approval. Submit in Salesforce before EOD.
Sunstone Capital agreed to a 2-year deal at 8% discount. Checking with VP before countersigning.
Can someone share the latest competitive battle card? Need it before my Northgate call.
Just got off a call with Harbourview — they want to move to contract this week. Need legal ASAP.
Zenith Platforms contract fully executed ✅ Handing off to CS now.
Upland Systems ghosted for 3 weeks. Sent breakup email. Sometimes that works 😅
Terrace Software asked for implementation timeline — sending over SOW template today
Stonebridge Holdings legal review complete — moving to final approval. Should close by Friday.
Parkside Solutions: renewal conversation starting. They want a multi-year discount.
Oceanfront Labs is doing a PoC. Week 2 check-in call went well — they love the API.
OOO: I'm out Thursday-Friday. Northstar Media is covered by Jordan if anything urgent comes up.
Meadowbrook Tech delayed decision to Q2 — board didn't approve new software spend this quarter
Highpoint Consulting wants a custom integration quote. Looping in Solutions team.
Foxridge Capital: verbal yes from the CFO. Contract coming this week!
Week 9 leaderboard just posted. Three of us are over 130% — great work everyone!
Good news: Alpine Digital signed! 2-year deal, $110k ARR. Nicely done Kevin!
Harbourview Capital: champion just left the company 😬 Need to re-map the account
CloudBridge Systems is requesting a technical deep-dive on security architecture. Need an SE for March 8
Standup: Yesterday - Vertex Capital call. Today - Northgate demo. Blocker: legal review taking 2 weeks
New competitive intel doc posted in #competitive. Ironridge is offering 20% discount to steal accounts.
Cascade Analytics came back from procurement — they're asking for net-60 terms
PSA: CRM maintenance Saturday 2-4am. Save your work Friday night.
Anyone have a good champion letter template for manufacturing accounts?
Congrats to Megan on closing Thornwood Partners! 🎉 $95k ARR
Reminder: pipeline review call at 3pm today. Please update your opps before then.
Morning all! Big week ahead — let's close Q1 strong 💪

Post-Demo Playbook: After Demo completes, advance opp to Proposal. Schedule pricing discussion via Calendly with the primary buyer. Set up a Zoom meeting for the technical Q&A with the technical lead. Stage the contract in DocuSign as a draft (do not send yet).

evidence.fact: Salesforce opportunity `opp_tv` is `TechVentures - Enterprise Deal`, AccountId `001_TV`, Amount $250,000, StageName `Demo`, IsClosed false, and IsWon false.

The post-demo playbook in `#deal-room-techventures` says: after Demo, advance the opportunity to Proposal; schedule a pricing discussion via Calendly with the primary buyer; set up a Zoom technical Q&A with the technical lead; and stage the contract in DocuSign as a draft without sending it.

content.summary: Retrieved the matching TechVentures opportunity and its post-demo playbook. The opportunity is currently at Demo for $250,000, and the playbook directs advancement to Proposal, pricing and technical follow-ups, and drafting—but not sending—the contract.

content.feedback: The retrieval step satisfied its evidence requirements, but the playbook adds pending work not covered by the current plan: schedule a Calendly pricing discussion with the primary buyer and set up a Zoom technical Q&A with the technical lead. Replan to resolve both contacts, create those meetings, retain the separate preparation-time calendar block, then include all completed actions in the deal-room update.

Replan to resolve both contacts, create those meetings, retain the separate preparation-time calendar block, then include all completed actions in the deal-room update.

arguments.prompt: Generate concise proposal talking points for the TechVentures enterprise deal immediately after a completed demo. Deal value: $250,000. Audience: Primary Buyer, VP of Operations (buyer@techventures.example.com), and Technical Lead, CTO (tech@techventures.example.com). The opportunity is advancing from Demo to Proposal. Provide practical seller-ready talking points covering business outcomes, enterprise value, technical confidence, implementation/adoption, commercial framing, risk mitigation, and a clear next-step close. Do not invent product-specific capabilities, ROI percentages, timelines, legal terms, or customer facts beyond what is given. Format as crisp bullets suitable for a proposal-prep brief.

arguments.description:
Preparation block for the $250,000 TechVentures enterprise proposal after the completed demo.

Proposal talking points:
• Business outcomes: reconnect the proposal to the VP of Operations’ priorities and desired business outcomes.
• Enterprise value: frame the $250,000 investment around organization-wide value without asserting unvalidated ROI.
• Technical confidence: prepare clear responses for the CTO on fit, implementation considerations, and open technical questions.
• Implementation and adoption: outline a practical approach to rollout, stakeholder alignment, and adoption; validate timing with TechVentures.
• Commercial framing: clearly present scope and investment, and identify items requiring buyer confirmation.
• Risk mitigation: surface open dependencies, ownership, and decision risks with concrete follow-up actions.
• Next-step close: seek agreement on remaining validation, decision process, owners, and target next action.

Upcoming follow-ups:
• Pricing Discussion: Apr 1, 2026, 17:00–17:45 UTC with Primary Buyer; Technical Lead included as guest.
• Technical Q&A: Apr 2, 2026, 17:00–17:45 UTC; Zoom https://zoom.us/j/9179087490.

Draft contract material: Enterprise Agreement envelope b1300574-3d4d-4188-96a3-569c19f5437b is staged in DocuSign as a draft and has not been sent.

arguments.text:
*TechVentures post-demo update*
• Deal advanced to *Proposal* for the $250,000 enterprise opportunity.
• Buyer pricing discussion: *Apr 1, 2026, 17:00–17:45 UTC* with Primary Buyer; Technical Lead included.
• Technical Q&A: *Apr 2, 2026, 17:00–17:45 UTC* — Zoom: https://zoom.us/j/9179087490
• Enterprise Agreement staged in DocuSign as an *unsent draft* for internal review (envelope `b1300574-3d4d-4188-96a3-569c19f5437b`).
• Private proposal/follow-up prep block booked for *Apr 1, 15:30–16:30 UTC*.
• Proposal talking points prepared: buyer business outcomes, enterprise value, technical confidence, implementation/adoption, commercial framing, risk mitigation, and agreement on decision process/owners/next action.

opportunities.name: TechVentures - Enterprise Deal
opportunities.next_step: Prepare and present tailored $250,000 enterprise proposal to TechVentures primary buyer and technical lead.

messages.text: Post-Demo Playbook: After Demo completes, advance opp to Proposal. Schedule pricing discussion via Calendly with the primary buyer. Set up a Zoom meeting for the technical Q&A with the technical lead. Stage the contract in DocuSign as a draft (do not send yet).
Parkside Solutions: renewal conversation starting. They want a multi-year discount.
Meadowbrook Tech rescheduled again — Q2 for sure. Marking as delayed in CRM.
CloudBridge legal has questions about data residency. Looping in our DPO for a joint call.
Zenith Platforms contract fully executed ✅ Handing off to CS now.
Good news: Alpine Digital signed! 2-year deal, $110k ARR. Nicely done Kevin!
Wavecrest Analytics asking for a case study. Does anyone have an analytics vertical reference?
Reminder: pipeline review call at 3pm today. Please update your opps before then.
Big W: Bayside Analytics just signed! $85k ARR, 18-month deal. Congrats team! 🥳
Terrace Software asked for implementation timeline — sending over SOW template today
CloudBridge Systems is requesting a technical deep-dive on security architecture. Need an SE for March 8
Reminder: all deals >$50k need second-level approval. Submit in Salesforce before EOD.
PSA: CRM maintenance Saturday 2-4am. Save your work Friday night.
Foxridge Capital — legal pushed back on the liability cap. Anyone dealt with this before?
Maplecrest Systems sent us an unsolicited security questionnaire — anyone know this account?
Week 9 leaderboard just posted. Three of us are over 130% — great work everyone!
New competitive intel doc posted in #competitive. Ironridge is offering 20% discount to steal accounts.
Ironridge is back! After 6 weeks dark they replied to the breakup email. Scheduling a call.
Anyone have a good champion letter template for manufacturing accounts?
Week 10 starts Monday. Let's sprint to close! Who needs backup on any deals?
Anyone have a warm contact at Northstar Media? Need an intro for the media vertical.
Terrace Software close call Friday! Getting the MSA signed before Q1 ends.
Sunstone Capital agreed to a 2-year deal at 8% discount. Checking with VP before countersigning.
OOO: I'm out Thursday-Friday. Northstar Media is covered by Jordan if anything urgent comes up.
Cascade Analytics came back from procurement — they're asking for net-60 terms
Just got off a call with Harbourview — they want to move to contract this week. Need legal ASAP.
Foxridge Capital: verbal yes from the CFO. Contract coming this week!
Morning all! Big week ahead — let's close Q1 strong 💪
Meadowbrook Tech delayed decision to Q2 — board didn't approve new software spend this quarter
Harbourview Capital: champion just left the company 😬 Need to re-map the account
Q1 close plan: 5 deals in final stage, $620k at risk. Let's align on blockers today.
Highpoint Consulting wants a custom integration quote. Looping in Solutions team.
Congrats to Megan on closing Thornwood Partners! 🎉 $95k ARR
Stonebridge Holdings legal review complete — moving to final approval. Should close by Friday.
Oceanfront Labs pilot complete — 9/10 satisfaction. Moving to full deployment next month 🎉
Can someone share the latest competitive battle card? Need it before my Northgate call.
Standup: Yesterday - Vertex Capital call. Today - Northgate demo. Blocker: legal review taking 2 weeks
Stonebridge Holdings asked for a multi-year price lock. Escalating to pricing committee.
OOO Wed-Thu for QBR prep. All my accounts covered — ping me if urgent.
Oceanfront Labs is doing a PoC. Week 2 check-in call went well — they love the API.
Upland Systems ghosted for 3 weeks. Sent breakup email. Sometimes that works 😅

*TechVentures post-demo update*
• Deal advanced to *Proposal* for the $250,000 enterprise opportunity.
• Buyer pricing discussion: *Apr 1, 2026, 17:00–17:45 UTC* with Primary Buyer; Technical Lead included.
• Technical Q&A: *Apr 2, 2026, 17:00–17:45 UTC* — Zoom: https://zoom.us/j/9179087490
• Enterprise Agreement staged in DocuSign as an *unsent draft* for internal review (envelope `b1300574-3d4d-4188-96a3-569c19f5437b`).
• Private proposal/follow-up prep block booked for *Apr 1, 15:30–16:30 UTC*.
• Proposal talking points prepared: buyer business outcomes, enterprise value, technical confidence, implementation/adoption, commercial framing, risk mitigation, and agreement on decision process/owners/next action.

meetings.agenda: Post-demo technical Q&A for the TechVentures enterprise proposal with the technical lead. Address implementation, technical confidence, risk mitigation, and open technical questions.
